title: Oma's Fudge
ingredients: 2 cups good quality semisweet chocolate chips
instructions: In a large bowl, place walnuts, butter, and chocolate chips.
In a saucepan, place sugar, marshmallows, and milk.
Heat, stirring, until mixture starts to boil.
Pour the hot mixture over the chocolate mixture and let the chocolate and butter melt.
Pour into a lightly buttered square pan to harden.
Let cool and cut into squares.
notes: Katie used to love to make this at Christmas time.
